Description: "Embed useKieTTS hook and API setting getters natively in VerticalVideoSuitePortal.tsx"
Instruction: "Replace the top hook imports with local getters for openrouter_key and kie_api_key from localStorage, and define an embedded useKieTTS hook that uses standard fetch requests."
TargetContent: "import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';\nimport { getActiveOpenRouterKey, getActiveKieKey } from '../../hooks/useApiSettings';\nimport { useKieTTS } from '../../hooks/useKieTTS';"
